9:33 am
The Court passes the matter a first time, Plaintiff was running late.

9:45
The Court calls the matter a second time. The Court admonishes Plaintiff's Counsel. There are no opposition papers filed, did not qualify for the tentative ruling rule and has outstanding sanctions. Defendant is allowed to speak briefly. Plaintiff's request to file Opposition papers is denied. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TRANS PACIFIC NATIONAL BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is sustained without leave to amend. No opposition filed. Order is signed in open court.(see scanned order for details) Prevailing party to submit a proposed judgment. Counsel may file a motion for reconsideration in the future, if compliance with the rules is met. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
